< Home >

GET restapi/personal/instantmessages/messagethreads/{threadId}/v1?maxMessages={maxMessages}&upperBoundInstantMessageId={upperBoundInstantMessageId}&lowerBoundInstantMessageId={lowerBoundInstantMessageId}

DEPRECATED use "messagethreads/{threadId}/messages/v2" instead.

Gets the messages in a specific thread if the user is a recipient in the thread. One cannot use both lowerBoundInstantMessageId and upperBoundInstantMessageId

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
threadId

The thread id

 integer

Required
maxMessages

Maximum number of messages to get

 integer

None.
upperBoundInstantMessageId

Load messages before this instant message id

 integer, 64 bit

None.
lowerBoundInstantMessageId

Load messages after this instant message id

 integer, 64 bit

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

List of InstantMessage entities

EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.InstantMessage
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EntityArray

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.InstantMessage

None.
Total

integer

None.
CurrentPageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "EntityArray": [
    {
      "MessageId": 1,
      "MessageThreadId": 2,
      "InstantMessageThreadId": 3,
      "MessageThreadParticipants": [
        {
          "PersonId": 1,
          "Name": "sample string 1",
          "AvatarUrl": "sample string 2",
          "LocationType": 1,
          "LocationId": 1
        },
        {
          "PersonId": 1,
          "Name": "sample string 1",
          "AvatarUrl": "sample string 2",
          "LocationType": 1,
          "LocationId": 1
        }
      ],
      "Created": "2026-03-07T16:36:58Z",
      "CreatedFormatted": "sample string 5",
      "CreatedRelative": "sample string 6",
      "EditedRelative": "sample string 7",
      "CreatedBy": 8,
      "CreatedByName": "sample string 9",

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<EntityList xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CurrentPageIndex>2</CurrentPageIndex>
  <EntityArray xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities">
    <d2p1:InstantMessage>
      <d2p1:AdditionalHeading>sample string 32</d2p1:AdditionalHeading>
      <d2p1:AttachmentName>sample string 14</d2p1:AttachmentName>
      <d2p1:AttachmentUrl>sample string 13</d2p1:AttachmentUrl>
      <d2p1:CanDelete>true</d2p1:CanDelete>
      <d2p1:CanEdit>true</d2p1:CanEdit>
      <d2p1:ChildMessage>
        <d2p1:AdditionalHeading>sample string 32</d2p1:AdditionalHeading>
        <d2p1:AttachmentName>sample string 14</d2p1:AttachmentName>
        <d2p1:AttachmentUrl>sample string 13</d2p1:AttachmentUrl>
        <d2p1:CanDelete>true</d2p1:CanDelete>
        <d2p1:CanEdit>true</d2p1:CanEdit>
        <d2p1:ChildMessage i:nil="true" />
        <d2p1:Created>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</d2p1:Created>
        <d2p1:CreatedBy>8</d2p1:CreatedBy>
        <d2p1:CreatedByAvatar>sample string 11</d2p1:CreatedByAvatar>
        <d2p1:CreatedByName>sample string 9</d2p1:CreatedByName>
        <d2p1:CreatedByShortName>sample string 38</d2p1:CreatedByShortName>
        <d2p1:CreatedFormatted>sample string 5</d2p1:CreatedFormatted>
        <d2p1:CreatedLocal>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</d2p1:CreatedLocal>
        <d2p1:CreatedLocalDateStamp>sample string 37</d2p1:CreatedLocalDateStamp>
        <d2p1:CreatedLocalShortNumericDate>sample string 39</d2p1:CreatedLocalShortNumericDate>
        <d2p1:CreatedLocalTimeStamp>sample string 36</d2p1:CreatedLocalTimeStamp>
        <d2p1:CreatedRelative>sample string 6</d2p1:CreatedRelative>
        <d2p1:DeletedBy>20</d2p1:DeletedBy>
        <d2p1:EditedRelative>sample string 7</d2p1:EditedRelative>
        <d2p1:HasAbuseReported>true</d2p1:HasAbuseReported>
        <d2p1:HasAbuseThreadReported>true</d2p1:HasAbuseThreadReported>
        <d2p1:HasRepliedTo>true</d2p1:HasRepliedTo>
        <d2p1:HasShared>true</d2p1:HasShared>
        <d2p1:HomeOrganization>sample string 10</d2p1:HomeOrganization>
        <d2p1:InstantMessageThreadId>3</d2p1:InstantMessageThreadId>
        <d2p1:IsAbuse>true</d2p1:IsAbuse>
        <d2p1:IsBroadcastMassMessage>true</d2p1:IsBroadcastMassMessage>
        <d2p1:IsChildMessageDeletedPermanently>true</d2p1:IsChildMessageDeletedPermanently>
        <d2p1:IsDeleted>true</d2p1:IsDeleted>
        <d2p1:IsEdited>true</d2p1:IsEdited>
        <d2p1:IsSilent>true</d2p1:IsSilent>
        <d2p1:IsStarred>true</d2p1:IsStarred>
        <d2p1:IsSystemMessage>true</d2p1:IsSystemMessage>
        <d2p1:Link>sample string 15</d2p1:Link>
        <d2p1:LinkTarget>sample string 17</d2p1:LinkTarget>
        <d2p1:LinkTitle>sample string 16</d2p1:LinkTitle>
        <d2p1:MessageId>1</d2p1:MessageId>
        <d2p1:MessageThreadId>2</d2p1:MessageThreadId>
        <d2p1:MessageThreadParticipants>
          <d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
            <d2p1:AvatarUrl>sample string 2</d2p1:AvatarUrl>
            <d2p1:LocationId>1</d2p1:LocationId>
            <d2p1:LocationType>1</d2p1:LocationType>
            <d2p1:Name>sample string 1</d2p1:Name>
            <d2p1:PersonId>1</d2p1:PersonId>
          </d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
          <d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
            <d2p1:AvatarUrl>sample string 2</d2p1:AvatarUrl>
            <d2p1:LocationId>1</d2p1:LocationId>
            <d2p1:LocationType>1</d2p1:LocationType>
            <d2p1:Name>sample string 1</d2p1:Name>
            <d2p1:PersonId>1</d2p1:PersonId>
          </d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
        </d2p1:MessageThreadParticipants>
        <d2p1:OriginInstantMessage i:nil="true" />
        <d2p1:OriginInstantMessageThreadDeletedBy>1</d2p1:OriginInstantMessageThreadDeletedBy>
        <d2p1:OriginInstantMessageThreadId>1</d2p1:OriginInstantMessageThreadId>
        <d2p1:OriginInstantMessageThreadName>sample string 31</d2p1:OriginInstantMessageThreadName>
        <d2p1:Text>sample string 12</d2p1:Text>
      </d2p1:ChildMessage>
      <d2p1:Created>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</d2p1:Created>
      <d2p1:CreatedBy>8</d2p1:CreatedBy>
      <d2p1:CreatedByAvatar>sample string 11</d2p1:CreatedByAvatar>
      <d2p1:CreatedByName>sample string 9</d2p1:CreatedByName>
      <d2p1:CreatedByShortName>sample string 38</d2p1:CreatedByShortName>
      <d2p1:CreatedFormatted>sample string 5</d2p1:CreatedFormatted>
      <d2p1:CreatedLocal>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</d2p1:CreatedLocal>
      <d2p1:CreatedLocalDateStamp>sample string 37</d2p1:CreatedLocalDateStamp>

      <d2p1:DeletedBy>20</d2p1:DeletedBy>
      <d2p1:EditedRelative>sample string 7</d2p1:EditedRelative>
      <d2p1:HasAbuseReported>true</d2p1:HasAbuseReported>
      <d2p1:HasAbuseThreadReported>true</d2p1:HasAbuseThreadReported>
      <d2p1:HasRepliedTo>true</d2p1:HasRepliedTo>
      <d2p1:HasShared>true</d2p1:HasShared>
      <d2p1:HomeOrganization>sample string 10</d2p1:HomeOrganization>
      <d2p1:InstantMessageThreadId>3</d2p1:InstantMessageThreadId>
      <d2p1:IsAbuse>true</d2p1:IsAbuse>
      <d2p1:IsBroadcastMassMessage>true</d2p1:IsBroadcastMassMessage>
      <d2p1:IsChildMessageDeletedPermanently>true</d2p1:IsChildMessageDeletedPermanently>
      <d2p1:IsDeleted>true</d2p1:IsDeleted>

      <d2p1:Link>sample string 15</d2p1:Link>
      <d2p1:LinkTarget>sample string 17</d2p1:LinkTarget>
      <d2p1:LinkTitle>sample string 16</d2p1:LinkTitle>
      <d2p1:MessageId>1</d2p1:MessageId>
      <d2p1:MessageThreadId>2</d2p1:MessageThreadId>
      <d2p1:MessageThreadParticipants>
        <d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
          <d2p1:AvatarUrl>sample string 2</d2p1:AvatarUrl>
          <d2p1:LocationId>1</d2p1:LocationId>
          <d2p1:LocationType>1</d2p1:LocationType>
          <d2p1:Name>sample string 1</d2p1:Name>
          <d2p1:PersonId>1</d2p1:PersonId>
        </d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
        <d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
          <d2p1:AvatarUrl>sample string 2</d2p1:AvatarUrl>
          <d2p1:LocationId>1</d2p1:LocationId>
          <d2p1:LocationType>1</d2p1:LocationType>
          <d2p1:Name>sample string 1</d2p1:Name>
          <d2p1:PersonId>1</d2p1:PersonId>
        </d2p1:InstantMessageParticipant>
      </d2p1:MessageThreadParticipants>
      <d2p1:OriginInstantMessage>
        <d2p1:AdditionalHeading>sample string 32</d2p1:AdditionalHeading>
        <d2p1:AttachmentName>sample string 14</d2p1:AttachmentName>
        <d2p1:AttachmentUrl>sample string 13</d2p1:AttachmentUrl>
        <d2p1:CanDelete>true</d2p1:CanDelete>
        <d2p1:CanEdit>true</d2p1:CanEdit>
        <d2p1:ChildMessage i:nil="true" />

        <d2p1:CreatedByAvatar>sample string 11</d2p1:CreatedByAvatar>
